title: Filter Rules for Operational Reporting in Datilio
summary: Operational reporting needs the same slice every week. Datilio filter rules encode that slice once.

content.summary: Operational reporting needs the same slice every week. Datilio filter rules encode that slice once.

body.text: Re-clicking twelve filters every Monday is how reporting drift begins. Stack date range, status, region, and exclusion filters until row count matches finance expectations. Name rules after the report they feed—Board-Revenue-Core-Q1.

body.alt: Team collaborating around data on a screen
body.caption: Team collaborating around data on a screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Stack date range, status, region, and exclusion filters until row count matches finance expectations.
Name rules after the report they feed—Board-Revenue-Core-Q1.

items: Validate against control totals before saving.
Share rule names across the team wiki.

body.text: Fresh export plus apply-rule equals updated charts and AI scope in one click.
Ops teams treat rules like code: reviewed, named, versioned.
Datilio filter rules turn ad hoc exploration into operational infrastructure.
